name: paybridge-np/woocommerce
description: WooCommerce payment gateway plugin for PayBridgeNP

build: cd .. && rm -rf paybridge-np-woocommerce paybridge-np-woocommerce.zip && cp -r woocommerce paybridge-np-woocommerce && find paybridge-np-woocommerce -name '.*' -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && zip -r paybridge-np-woocommerce.zip paybridge-np-woocommerce/ && rm -rf paybridge-np-woocommerce && echo 'Built: packages/paybridge-np-woocommerce.zip'
